notebooks.title: RF Amplifier Compression
notebooks.description: Simulation of an RF amplifier with gain compression demonstrating the third-order nonlinearity model. We sweep the input power and observe the 1 dB compression point and gain saturation behavior.

notebooks.title: RF Mixer Downconversion
notebooks.description: Simulation of a superheterodyne downconversion stage using the  block. A high-frequency RF signal is mixed with a local oscillator (LO) to produce an intermediate frequency (IF) output.

notebooks.title: Superheterodyne Receiver Chain
notebooks.description: Simulation of a basic superheterodyne receiver front-end combining multiple PathSim-RF blocks: an RF amplifier (LNA), a mixer for downconversion, and an IF amplifier. This demonstrates how the bloc...

notebooks.title: Transmission Line Pulse Propagation
notebooks.description: Simulation of pulse propagation through a lossy transmission line using the  block. We observe the propagation delay and attenuation of a Gaussian pulse traveling through the line.
